title: Count Rows per Group in MySQL
summary: Return one row count per group value in MySQL with GROUP BY and COUNT(*).
verification_setup: Ensure mysql, mysqladmin, and mysqld are available on PATH.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 and MySQL 8.4.0 on macOS. The tests start a temporary MySQL instance with local mysql binaries, then verify grouped counts, sorting, tie-breaking, single-group results, and counting rows with NULL values in other columns.
